title: How agents are transforming work
author: openai-blog
raw_description: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.
summary: OpenAI新研究论文探讨AI代理如何通过执行更长时间、更复杂的任务来变革工作方式，提升各角色的生产力。
analysis_note: 来自OpenAI的顶级研究，聚焦AI代理关键突破，技术深度高，对行业有重要影响。
